description: Locate the root cause of a strategy receipt scoring inconsistency where offline benchmark scores differ from live run receipts.
user_prompt: There's a bug where score_receipt_from_case() returns a different overall_score than what the live StrategyReceiptEmitter emits. Find the root cause and explain the fix.
workspace_fixture: polaris/kernelone/context/ directory — specifically strategy_benchmark.py, strategy_scoring.py, strategy_receipts.py, and strategy_contracts.py.
